'''dhazhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctography|nyctography]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctography|nyctography]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhazhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhæzhingith || dhæzhingij || dhæzhingish || dhæzhingi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhazhuzhunguth || dhazhuzhunguj || dhazhuzhungush || dhazhuzhungu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhazhunguth || dhazhunguj || dhazhungush || dhazhungu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhazhufngufth || dhazhufngufj || dhazhufngufsh || dhazhufnguf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhazhunguthu || dhazhunguju || dhazhungushu || dhazhunguku
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhazhunguth || dhazhunguj || dhazhungush || dhazhungu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhazhunguthul || dhazhungujul || dhazhungushul || dhazhungukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhazhunguuthuthu || dhazhunguujuju || dhazhunguushushu || dhazhunguuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhazhunguthun || dhazhungujun || dhazhungushun || dhazhungukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhazhunguthuoro || dhazhungujuoro || dhazhungushuoro || dhazhungukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
